Localization.Description: The SharpHound (BloodHound) utility used to collect information about Active Directory objects was started using one of the following collection methods: DCOnly, LocalGroup (--Stealth), ComputerOnly (--Stealth), RDP (--Stealth), DCOM (--Stealth), GPOLocalGroup, LocalAdmin (--Stealth)

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} performed actions similar to the SharpHound (BloodHound) software activity to collect information from domain controller {event_src.host}

User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} started utility {object.process.name} whose behavior is specific to the SharpHound (BloodHound) software to collect information from domain controller {event_src.host}
